# STRAT.037 ? Transformational Leadership (Bass)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** leadership_frameworks
**Domain:** LEADERSHIP_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Idealized influence; inspirational motivation; intellectual stimulation; individualized consideration; elevate followers; change focus

## Application
Model values; inspire with vision; stimulate thinking; individual attention; elevate motivation; transform people and organization

## Key Values
- Vision inspiration
- Intellectual stimulation
- Individual consideration
- Elevation
- Transformation
